task: Standardize the .agent-dashboard schema so the dashboard app can parse reports consistently.

linked_goal.reason: Schema standardization supports reliable cross-thread coordination and dashboard parsing.

summary: Defined TypeScript-compatible schemas, canonical status rules, existing-report warnings, and legacy migration guidance for dashboard parsing.

completed_work.title: Full dashboard read
completed_work.evidence: Read all existing files under .agent-dashboard before editing.

completed_work.title: Schema definition
completed_work.evidence: Updated report-schema.md with TypeScript-compatible schemas for ProjectConfig, CurrentStatus, GoalFile, Goal, Milestone, Task, AgentRunReport, ThreadSummary, VerificationCheck, Blocker, and Decision.

completed_work.title: Migration guidance
completed_work.evidence: Added legacy status normalization rules and existing-report warnings.

remaining_work: Implement the dashboard parser against the documented schemas.
Normalize legacy statuses in dashboard display.

blockers.title: Placeholder task details
blockers.details: The earlier placeholder implementation request remains blocked until actual task details are supplied.

verification.name: dashboard_files_read
verification.details: Read all existing files under .agent-dashboard before editing.

verification.name: schema_example_review
verification.details: The canonical run report example in report-schema.md uses the documented AgentRunReport fields and canonical statuses.

verification.name: json_parse_check
verification.details: All JSON files under .agent-dashboard parsed successfully with PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json after schema updates.

verification.name: interface_presence_check
verification.details: Confirmed report-schema.md contains ProjectConfig, CurrentStatus, GoalFile, Goal, Milestone, Task, AgentRunReport, ThreadSummary, VerificationCheck, Blocker, and Decision interfaces.

verification.details: No application code exists in the workspace and no application behavior was changed.

next_recommended_prompts: Implement a dashboard parser that reads .agent-dashboard using the schemas in protocol/report-schema.md and normalizes legacy statuses.

secret_handling.notes: No secrets, credentials, tokens, cookies, private keys, or raw logs were added.
